# SpecKit Constitution

Use `@conductor.powder` as the user-facing entrypoint for this manual SpecKit stage.

## Instructions

1. Ensure `plans/powder-active-task-plan.md` reflects the current planning objective.
2. Delegate the constitution work to `@speckit.constitution`.
3. Record the resulting artifact or decision summary in the active task capsule.
4. Recommend the next appropriate stage.
